component.name: WallShuffle
component.summary: A professional wallpaper manager for Linux desktops

description.p: WallShuffle is a premium, privacy-first wallpaper manager designed for GNOME, KDE, and XFCE. It features high-quality Unsplash integration, local image effects (Blur, Sepia, Grayscale), and robust multi-monitor support (span, repeat, or unique images per screen).

ul.li: Privacy-first: Local processing and redacted logs
Lightweight: Minimal resource usage with systemd timers
Highly compatible: Supports major Linux Desktop Environments
Critical fix for Wayland segmentation faults
Resolved tray icon persistence issues on Save
Hardened process management and locking mechanism
Improved systemd integration and error reporting
